data.title: 3 E Network Appoints Mr. Siyang Hu as Vice President to Strengthen Technology Leadership
data.description: A new VP has been named at 3E Network (NASDAQ: MASK). Siyang Hu, who has over two decades of experience in semiconductor and IC design from renowned companies such as Samsung, will be taking on the role.

data.title: Ocugen Announces Topline 12-month Data from Phase 2 ArMaDa Clinical Trial Evaluating OCU410 Modifier Gene Therapy for Geographic Atrophy Secondary to Dry Age-Related Macular Degeneration
data.description: Ocugen, a leading biotechnology company, released encouraging results from the Phase 2 ArMaDa clinical trial of OCU410 for geographic atrophy (GA) due to dry age-related macular degeneration (dAMD). The trial showcased positive 12-month data for the novel modifier gene therapy AAV5-RORA. With approximately 266 million individuals globally affected by dAMD, GA specifically impacts around 2-3 million individuals in the United States and Europe. As the population ages, these numbers are anticipated to rise significantly.

data.title: NanoXplore Publishes Its First Sustainability Report
data.description: In Montreal, Quebec, on March 24, 2026, NanoXplore Inc. released its inaugural Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2025. NanoXplore, a prominent graphene corporation listed on TSX under GRA and OTCQX under NNXPF, celebrated the milestone.

data.title: NEAR Protocol at $1.30, RSI neutral at 51.26. Technicals hint at $1.45 potential by April if $1.35 reclaimed soon.
data.description: The current trading price of NEAR Protocol stands at $1.30, accompanied by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) sitting at 51.26. Through technical analysis, it has been indicated that there is a possibility of a breakout towards the $1.45 resistance level if the bulls manage to regain control above the $1.35 mark in the upcoming weeks.

data.title: WuXi Biologics Reports Record 2025 Annual Results
data.description: Revenue saw a significant annual growth of 16.7%, reaching RMB 21.8 billion. Revenue from continuous operations also experienced a robust over 20% year-on-year increase. The IFRS gross profit margin showed a noteworthy expansion to 46.0%, surging by 500 basis points compared to the previous year. Additionally, the adjusted gross profit margin saw an increase to 48.8%, marking a 340 basis points growth year-on-year. EBITDA climbed by 38.1% compared to the previous year. Moreover, the IFRS net profit exhibited a substantial growth of 45.3% year-on-year.

data.title: Virtuix Inc. makes Fast Company’s 2026 list of most innovative companies worldwide.
data.description: A recent report shows that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.8%, marking a significant decrease from the previous rate of 5.5%. The number of job openings has also increased by 15% compared to last quarter, with over 1.5 million positions currently available across various industries. Additionally, the average hourly wage has seen a slight increase of 2.5%, reaching $25.50. These positive indicators in the labor market suggest a strengthening economy and improved job prospects for individuals seeking employment opportunities.

data.title: Argus launches new global crude tanker index
data.description: Improved transparency has been introduced in shipping markets amidst a sharp increase in rates due to the Iran crisis. On March 24, 2026, the renowned energy and commodity price reporting agency Argus revealed the launch of the Argus Crude Tanker Index (ACTI). This composite index aims to offer a comprehensive overview of the expenses borne by shippers in transporting crude oil. The move comes at a critical time as rates continue to surge.

data.title: Investors doubt quick resolution in Iran, global markets facing pressure due to ongoing Middle East conflict.
data.description: Once more, global markets are facing pressure as concerns grow about the ongoing conflict in the Middle East potentially prolonging.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) aims for $0.18 breakout by April '26 from current $0.17 level. Possibility of hitting $0.15 before then.
data.description: The trading price of XLM stands at $0.17 currently, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 53. Technical analysis indicates the possibility of a breakout towards a $0.18 resistance level or a pullback to a $0.15 support level within the next 30 days.

data.title: ASP Isotopes Announces Strategic Collaboration Between Quantum Leap Energy and University of Bristol to Design Advanced Laser Research Facility
data.description: A partnership has been formed to establish a state-of-the-art lithium laser enrichment research facility in the United Kingdom. This collaboration aims to leverage expertise and resources to advance innovative technologies. The facility will focus on exploring advancements in lithium laser enrichment techniques, with an investment of approximately [insert amount] to support research and development. This initiative is set to propel the UK to the forefront of pioneering research in this field and drive breakthroughs in laser enrichment technology.
